## Description

Brief description of the example or change.

## Type

- [ ] New example
- [ ] Bug fix (existing example)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Template update

## Checklist

- [ ] Example runs successfully with a valid API key
- [ ] Added/updated README entry
- [ ] No hardcoded API keys or secrets
- [ ] Proper error handling included
- [ ] Type annotations (Python) or strict mode (TypeScript)
